ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "departure_location" TEXT /* Departure location of the flight */,
  "arrival_location" TEXT /* Arrival location of the flight */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Date of the flight */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time of the flight */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time of the flight */,
  "flight_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the flight */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the aircraft being used for the flight */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the flight */,
  "link" TEXT /* Booking link for the flight */,
  "flight_description" TEXT /* Description of the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_departure_location FOREIGN KEY ("departure_location") REFERENCES locations ("location_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_arrival_location FOREIGN KEY ("arrival_location") REFERENCES locations ("location_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "aircraft_name" TEXT /* Name of the aircraft */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the aircraft */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Passenger capacity of the aircraft */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year the aircraft was manufactured */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft (e.g., private jet, commercial airliner) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the aircraft the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_images_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the aircraft the amenity belongs to */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity */,
  "amenity_description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_amenities_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight being booked */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client who made the booking */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date when the booking was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, canceled) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Full name of the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the client */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the client resides */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the client resides */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability record */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the aircraft */,
  "available_date" TEXT /* Date for which the availability is being tracked */,
  "is_available" INTEGER /* Availability status of the aircraft on that date */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Maintenance status of the aircraft on that date (e.g., scheduled, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_availability_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "location_code" TEXT /* Code of the location (e.g., airport code) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the booking the review belongs to */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the client (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_reviews_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)
